positive: Minimalist abstract mountain range landscape silhouette. The mountains are composed of varying layered geometric shapes, suggesting depth and majesty, rendered in a deep indigo and charcoal gray color palette. The foreground contains stylized geometric elements resembling scattered constellations and celestial bodies (small dots, crescents, simple stars). Style is modern vector art, high contrast, with a clean, flat graphic appearance, reminiscent of sophisticated Nordic folk art. Composition should be centered and highly balanced, designed for single-color or limited-color screen printing on fabric. Studio lighting, crisp edges, clean lines. Aspect ratio square for apparel design.
